title: PojavLauncher Optimized Lite
description: A smaller version of PojavLauncher Optimized.
body:
PojavLauncher Optimized Lite greatly speeds up Minecraft with modern performance mods. The mods included in the modpack have been carefully selected due to which it gives better stability and increase in fps than most other modpacks.

![На заднем плане красивый вид майнкрафта, слева вверху логотип PojavLauncher Optimized Lite, слева внизу логотип PojavLauncher, посередине было написано 96fps, а стало 301fps.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4a07c7d7b1e31afba9199af7cc5b3f983016518.png)

PojavLauncher Optimized Lite is a simple mod pack designed to speed up Minecraft without changing the vanilla graphics of the game

PojavLauncher Optimized Lite is a fast growing modpack and is rapidly moving to new versions.
